74324.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 10
74324.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-10-cryptobeholder-qon1f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BO9egFykWRq%2BqDfGJplNC2w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1dVChcLketZsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq8aa23d~bf-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq8aa23d-bf
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: May CPI surged to a 3-year high of 4.2%, but a cooler core reading gave Bitcoin room to bounce above $62K; simultaneously, U.S. and EU regulators each made their first moves to bring prediction markets and DeFi under formal rule frameworks. 📊 US CPI Hits 4.2% — A 3-Year High — But Bitcoin Bounces on Cooler Core Reading May's U.S. Consumer Price Index confirmed headline inflation at 4.2% year-over-year — the highest level since early 2023 — as energy costs inflated by the ongoing Iran conflict pushed prices higher. The market-moving detail, however, was the core reading: stripping out food and energy, monthly inflation came in at 0.2%, slightly below the 0.3% feared by traders. Read full story ⚖️ CFTC Issues First-Ever U.S. Rule Proposal for Prediction Markets The Commodity Futures Trading Commission proposed the first formal federal rulemaking for prediction market contracts, opening a public comment period on a framework that would assess whether individual contracts serve the "public interest." The move arrives the same week Kalshi — facing insider-trading scrutiny — rolled out employer-disclosure requirements for traders in high-risk markets. More details 🇪🇺 EU Opens Consultation to Expand MiCA to Cover DeFi, Crypto Perps & Prediction Markets The European Commission has launched a formal consultation on extending MiCA's regulatory perimeter to asset classes deliberately left out of the original framework — including decentralized finance protocols, tokenized perpetual derivatives, and prediction markets. The consultation signals the EU is entering MiCA's second, more ambitious phase, with sweeping potential implications for DeFi protocols, onchain derivatives venues, and prediction platforms operating under European jurisdiction. Read more 🏦 Japan's Three Largest Banks Plan a Joint Yen Stablecoin — Launch Target: March 2027 MUFG Bank, Mizuho Bank, and Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation have signed a memorandum of understanding to jointly issue a yen-denominated stablecoin targeting commercial launch during fiscal year 2026 — no later than March 2027. The trio collectively dominate Japan's corporate and retail banking sector. See details 💰 Fold Sells $45M in Bitcoin to Eliminate All Debt — Stock Surges 160% Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin fintech firm Fold disclosed it liquidated approximately

74323.subject: Wall Street’s undignified SpaceX mania
74323.body:

 The Economist

Brooke Unger

Senior digital editor



Ahead of SpaceX’s gigantic initial public offering, you can see more rockets on Wall Street than at Cape Canaveral. It’s a sign of investment banks’ abasement before the likes of Elon Musk and the bosses of the AI companies who plan to follow him onto the market. Buttonwood, 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDN9AAcAAAAAAofllAOpxFxvZTySiqJJA2mbjJfixdN02GbJNXpS8VTBuAIpdlNHMQCxEx5J606Yd1DMWPgIKH3NadWJxO3gab6JIRb_hvplB3-a7Vg 
our markets columnist , looks at the causes and consequences of this power shift in finance.


In global affairs these days the strongmanism of Donald Trump, Xi Jinping and Vladimir Putin is in, and Europe’s commitment to rules and consensual politics looks naive. But

74322.subject: Is This The Best Bitcoin Accumulation Window?
74322.body:
Adrian's DeFi Insights 

Автор: Adrian Pape


Автор: Adrian Pape

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/best-bitcoin-accumulation-window-adrian-pape-xv9qe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bx%2F3SUOXtRDWmc7TxRKrMEg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1MEV40k4diZsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq85t06e~se-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq85t06e-se
  
Yes it happened again... Bitcoin slipped under $60,000 on Friday, and the timeline split into two camps. One camp is shaken. Two straight weeks of ETF outflows, a Saylor sale, price grinding lower. They’re reading it ever bearish after switching bullish at $80k. The other camp is adding. I’m in that camp. We added to spot at $60k last week and we’ve now deployed 60% of our remaining stables to solid long term investments. Let me be honest about why, because this only works if you read it the same way I do. This is one of the best windows in a while to accumulate Bitcoin for the long term. Not a guarantee. A setup. If you think BTC makes new all-time highs from here, and you think the regulatory backdrop keeps improving with the Genius Act, then the risk-to-reward at these levels is hard to ignore. But that “if” is the whole game. If you don’t believe Bitcoin goes higher, you shouldn’t be buying it at any price. There’s no clever framing around that. The setup only matters once you’ve taken a side. So take a side. Then we can talk about what’s happening in the market this week. ️ ⚡ On today's Episode: 📈 Market Update – Bitcoin slips under $60k and the timeline splits in two. The case for why this is one of the best long-term accumulation windows in a while, the regulatory tailwind from the Genius Act, and the only two scenarios that matter: a 35% drop to $39k, or a 2x from here. 💸 Market Flows – Two straight weeks of billion-dollar ETF outflows (-$1.72B, -$1.42B), and why most of it is a basis trade unwinding, not capitulation. Saylor's Strategy buys 1,550 BTC and sells 32 to fund the STRC dividend (the bullish part). Plus the macro squeeze: SpaceX's $75B IPO is about to pull liquidity right when the market wants it. 🐂 Alpha Insights – Where I'm actually positioned: added spot at $60k, 60% of stables deployed, limit orders staged to $40k, Strategy build around $100. The two questions that decide whether this setup is yours, and the STRC level to watch The current state of the market. Saylor is buying his own losses Strategy bought another 1,550 BTC for $101 million between June 1 and June 7. That puts them at 845,256 BTC, more than 4% of the entire 21 million supply. At today’s price, that stack sits on roughly $10.5 billion in unrealized losses. The new buying came days after Strategy’s first sale since December 2022: 32 coins at an average o

74315.subject: Minebea, Výplatná páska/Payslip 05/2026
74315.body: Milí kolegovia, v prílohe tejto správy sa nachádza Vaša výplatná páska. Na otvorenie výplatnej pásky použite posledné 4 číslice vášho rodného čísla (za lomkou). Ak ste si heslo zmenili, použite nové heslo. _________________________________________________ Dear all, attached to this e-mail is your payslip. To open your payslip, use the last 4 digits of your birth number (after the slash). If you have changed your password, please use the new one. S pozdravom / Best regards, Personnel & Payroll department Minebea Slovakia s.r.o K letisku 1637, 040 17 Kosice

74211.subject: Ebook pomôcka vytvorená z investičných prezentácií na štúdium
74211.body:
Ahojte,

V prílohe vám posielam novo-vytvorenú pomôcku pre vás. Investičný ebook,
ktorý je vytvorený z prezentácií, ktoré sme spolu študovali.

A čo viac - posielam vám SK verziu, EN verziu a UA verziu :)
Tak môžete skontrolovať aj UA verziu, či je to správne / použiteľné... snáď
tam bude čo najmenej prekladateľských chýb.
Prosím vás o kontrolu UA verzie. :)

-- 
S prianím pekného dňa,

*Maroš Sivák*
*InterFin, s.r.o.*
*Teamleader  & Invest-specialist*
*tel: **+421 9 <+421%20910%20684%20619>48 013 833*
*e-mail: **maro <martin.vittek@fincloud.sk>s.sivak.sro@
<s.sivak@fincloud.sk>gmail.com <http://gmail.com>*

*Dôležité:*

*Obsah informácií v tejto e-mailovej správe je dôverný alebo chránený a je
určený výhradne vyššie uvedeným adresátom alebo zástupcom. Obsah e-mailovej
správy je právne záväzný len vtedy, ak bol adresátovi písomne potvrdený.
Akákoľvek reprodukcia, prenos materiálu, neoprávnená duplikácia,
zverejnenie, zverejnenie a zverejnenie obsahu tohto e-mailu akejkoľvek
tretej strane je prísne zakázané. Ak nie ste uvedeným adresátom alebo jeho
zástupcom, nemáte právo na získanie informácií, ihneď kontaktujte
odosielateľa, pošlite mu e-mail (odpovedzte alebo odpovedzte na e-mail) a
tento e-mail zničte. Ak ste túto e-mailovú správu (vrátane akejkoľvek
prílohy) dostali omylom, informujte o tom ihneď odosielateľa e-mailom a
natrvalo odstráňte pôvodný e-mail zo svojho systému. Na informácie alebo
iné vyhlásenia adresátovi sa vzťahuje právo spoločnosti, ktorej boli
poskytnuté, najmä všeobecné obchodné podmienky a prípadne individuálna
dohoda. Dobrovoľne súhlasíte so spracovaním osobných údajov na marketingové
účely v súlade s ustanovením slovenského zákona § 13 ods. 1 písm. a) zákona
č. 18/2018 Z. z. o ochrane osobných údajov a zmene niektorých zákonov
(ďalej len „zákon“). Dokumenty sú k dispozícii nižšie.*
